questions.question: Describe the primary producer in a forest ecosystem and its role in the food chain. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the forest ecosystem type

questions.question: Compare and contrast the adaptations of plants and animals in a desert ecosystem with those in a wetland ecosystem. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the unique characteristics of each ecosystem type

questions.question: Explain the concept of a riverine ecosystem and describe the primary consumer in this type of ecosystem. (5 marks)
